title: CLIFlag
description: Schema for a single Odoo CLI flag entry in cli_flags_<version>.json

flag_name.description: The CLI flag name, e.g. '--addons-path' or '-d'

command_name.description: The subcommand this flag belongs to (e.g. 'server', 'shell'), or null for global flags

default.description: Default value as a string representation, or null if none

help.description: Help text from the CLI definition

replacement_flag_name.description: Successor flag name when status is deprecated or removed, or null

env_name.description: Environment variable override for this flag, or null

posix_only.description: True if this flag is only available on POSIX (Linux/macOS) systems
